name: stench
short_effect: Has a 10% chance of making target Pokémon flinch with each hit.
effect_text: This Pokémon's damaging moves have a 10% chance to make the target flinch with each hit if they do not already cause flinching as a secondary effect.  This ability does not stack with a held item.  Overworld: The wild encounter rate is halved while this Pokémon is first in the party.
flavor_text: By releasing a stench when attacking, the Pokémon may cause the target to flinch.
